inline_comments.message:
is this supported? I never seen the streams included like this for a job parameters. I have only seen them like they are in line 22. 

If this is not supported, I would recommend duplicating this block like this:


      - "{project-name}-{stream}-verify-helm":
          build_script: "{oom_build_script}"
          files: "**"
          build-timeout: 240
          stream: master
  
      - "{project-name}-{stream}-verify-helm":
          build_script: "{oom_build_script}"
          files: "**"
          build-timeout: 240
          stream: guilin
it was supported but your proposal allows to set "helm_bin" part so I've used it
I would rather consider that helm should be declared here according to your commit message
